meta_title: Free Online PDF Compressor | Reduce PDF File Size
meta_description: Compress PDF documents online instantly. Shrink file sizes while maintaining text readability. 100% private, browser-based tool.
subtitle: Reduce PDF sizes without losing document clarity. Shrink scanned docs, optimize attachments—all processed securely in your browser.

tool_workspace.description: Drag and drop your PDF below. Adjust quality parameters to optimize the file size.

social_presets.description: Optimized presets for different PDF sharing and application requirements.

how_to.title: How to Compress a PDF Online
how_to.step1_text: Select the PDF document from your device. The document loads locally in your browser memory.
how_to.step2_text: Select Low, Medium, or High compression depending on your desired file size reduction.
how_to.step3_text: Click 'Compress PDF' to run the optimization algorithms in client-side JavaScript.
how_to.step4_text: Save the newly compressed PDF document to your device immediately.

faq.a1: Yes. Since all processing runs locally on your device, no data is sent to external servers. Your documents remain private.
faq.a2: No. The compressor targets image assets inside the PDF, leaving vectors, fonts, and text layout crisp.
faq.a3: No, you must unlock password-protected PDF files before processing them.
